seoTitle: Conjola Park vs Connells Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Conjola Park and Connells Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Conjola Park vs Connells Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Conjola Park and Connells Point.
heading: Conjola Park vs Connells Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Conjola Park, New South Wales and Connells Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Conjola Park has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Connells Point (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Conjola Park or Connells Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Conjola Park has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Connells Point scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Conjola Park scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Connells Point scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Conjola Park or Connells Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Conjola Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
